review_title: A Long‑Term Partner in Building Robust Applications
description: My experience with PHPRunner has been excellent since the early 2.0 days. It has helped us build stable, efficient applications, including a complex CRM for customer and HR management. The platform is solid, reliable and continuously improving. The move toward AI and advanced Intellisense in 11.3 confirms the strong vision and professionalism of the Xlinesoft team.
author: Ionel C.
pros: PHPRunner makes application development fast, clear and efficient. It provides a stable, well‑structured environment that allows you to build robust solutions quickly, including complex projects like CRM systems. The platform evolves consistently, and the upcoming 11.3 release with AI and enhanced Intellisense is a major advantage.
cons: PHPRunner is a very mature platform, and the areas for improvement are minor. Advanced customization can require some learning time, and a few interface sections could be more modern. The new AI features and expanded Intellisense in version 11.3 already address many of these points.

review_title: Awesome low code tools with value for money
description: With 15 years of experience in PHPRunner, I’ve found it to be an invaluable tool for delivering a wide variety of projects.
author: Fajar I.
pros: Cost-Effectiveness: High value for money with a strong return on investment. Robust Security: Enterprise-grade security features to ensure data integrity. Comprehensive Feature Set: A wide range of built-in tools and functionalities. Rapid Development & Scalability: Optimized for efficient building and future growth.
cons: The User Interface needs to be more intuitive. In version 11 using database makes it faster but, It takes more step to extract it to make it able to sync with git repository.

review_title: is a good product
author: carlo C.
pros: its ease of use,frendly and more easy to learn
cons: Integration of static pages with dynamic pages

review_title: Intuitive, Feature-Rich RAD Tool for Building Database Front Ends
description: Front ends for my databases - created using PHPRunner various applications for viewing, manipulating scientific data, displaying statistics, a project management platform based on it, human resources online software and many more. all done with the help of this tool
author: Cristian C.
pros: I use PHPRunner since version 5 (2008) now I am at version 11.2. It is a RAD tool for developing PHP front ends for almost every type of database and I found it extremely easy to use. The interface is intuitive and the flow is natural: tables design, query, security, design, style, events coding. If you are not very proficient in PHP, JS, CSS, HTML the solution still works out of the box for creating a very feature rich front end with CRUD functionalities for your databases. What I like is that you can connect directly or through tunnel to your database and is is extremely easy to implement custom code if you have the knowledge in order to extend the default functionalities. I can insert PHP code snippets directly in pages, add CSS at global level or granular on one page, one control and use events that cover every situation (both server side and client side). The customer support is good - they answer quite fast when you have a problem and there is a quite solid community on their support forums. They also have a market with plugins that extend functionalities or provide integration for very low prices and they simply work . You can also find YouTube channels with tutorials about the functionalities and how to expand them.
cons: Their integrated help is lacking in some points like documenting some functions, variables, parameters. Their blog could use some more examples with what can you do using PHPRunner

review_title: best low/no code platform
description: I am using it for years in many projects. esp. in the first few years I asked the hotline many times and got always a very fast und good support.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: stable, easy to use, very good support from company, good pricing, easy to install. while my first trial a was able to release a first project after a weekend - without development skills
cons: developed front ends should have a more modern look and feel. program database should have an easier way to backup, for such users like me

review_title: PHPRunner, possibilities unlimited
description: Only after years of use you realize the potential of PHPRunner (desktop/mobile). I've been using it since 2008 and I'm still very satisfied. At least one application per year for both business or personal use. Other generators aren't as comprehensive.
author: Jacques F.
pros: PHPRunner is very easy to use, allowing you to quickly create a user-friendly application. What I really appreciate is that you can then add very specific requirements in PHP or JavaScript. The extensive documentation is also a great help. If you know your code languages ​​there are no limitations
cons: I actually have no drawbacks. It's very stable and it does what you ask. The limitations are determined by the skills and knowledge of the programmer

review_title: Easy but powerful tool that allows you as much or as little control as you want
description: It's been great. Have been using it for over 10 years and has been of great value for my business. Our customers also like the websites we build with it.
author: Dan H.
pros: Easy to use, lots of features. Regularly updated. Lots of customisation options that scale with your coding skill level.
cons: New version (11) is greatly improved over previous version (10) in terms of responsiveness, memory use, and build times, but it occassionally crashes. I expect these small remaining bugs will be ironed out soon enough.

review_title: Quite simply the best code generator in the World - PHP Runner
description: We have been using Xlinesoft PHP Runner for more than fifteen years with great success. Our first project was for a group of local Museums that needed to display artifacts – we also needed a bilingual English/Welsh application – PHP Runner was the only choice. The project was achieved in quick time and was highly successful. Since then we have used PHP Runner for a number of database applications the latest of which is a complex Multi-Level Marketing system.
author: Robert M.
pros: Complex projects can be built in a fraction of the time needed for a more traditional approach with excellent inbuilt facilities to achieve a user friendly look and feel that would be difficult to achieve otherwise.
cons: No downsides The application is simple to install and easy to use - just connect to a database and build the project

review_title: PHP development made easy for me
description: I'using it since 15 years and continue to appreciate. It help me from 2020 to 2025 to develop a very serious back office for a billionaire company
author: Jean-Charles H.
pros: Simple to install, to learn and then to use. My customers adopted produccts I made for them very fast
cons: Transition to version 11 was not easy and took a long time. Some add ons are not very well integrated

review_title: PHPRunner since 2012
description: I have been using PHPRunner since 2012, and it has been a very reliable tool for me. With it, I have built more than 15 web applications, all working smoothly and meeting real business needs. It helps me turn database ideas into complete web apps quickly, without spending too much time on coding. The ready-made features save a lot of effort and make development faster. At the same time, it still allows me to customize things when needed. Overall, PHPRunner makes it easy to create high-quality applications in a short time.
author: Yurien S.
pros: Lo-code solution that helps me get the job in a very quick time. From idea to a working application in no time.
cons: Cannot think of any at this moment. Maybe in the future integration with AI can be added to this wonderful solution.

review_title: Easily develop web applications with PHPRunner
description: Overall experience with PHPRunner has been awesome. Initially, there was a bit of a learning curve since I have not used such a tool before. But I became comfortable very quickly and started developing amazing web apps with it
author: Kwabena B.
pros: PHPRunner is easy to use, especially if you have little or no PHP progamming background, it still be used. Also, the fact that you can connect it with so many databases. The web applications developed can be integrated with a database.
cons: So far my experience has been good. I will however encourage the developers to introduce more and more features.

review_title: A well thoughout rapid deployment, eficient and reliable software
description: I have created a donation tracking system for HELPING HANDS ENDING HUNGER LLC used by over 40 schools in Georgia, that tracks unopened/untouched food items that are repurposed at the end of the week as donations which are coupled with food banks donations. The software tracks certain items, their weight, the amount of CO2 Recovery and the number of meals created and number of persons served. Producing reports of items handled and donated. Since the inception of this application is has tracked and allowed to evaluate the effort put fort by kids who are trying to help peers who might otherwise go hungry on weekends. Numbers so far since 2017: FAMILIES HELPED - 48,637; ADULTS - 86,092; CHILDREN - 124,059 POUNDS DONATED - 520.052; CO2 RECOVERY 327,119; MEALS 433,755 PHPrunner was used from the ground up for this application no other software was ever involved ==================================================================================== PHPRunner used by STRATEGIC MEDIA BOOKS to track the production of books from manuscript reception, production, to launch, sales and production of royalty payments, in over 50 titles for 35 authors...
author: Alfredo F.
pros: It's ease of use to create basic applications that allows clients/users to grasp the concepts without complicated manuals
cons: I would say that some of the examples presented in the help need a bit more expansion.

review_title: Noob friendly, build your app in a day !
description: As a noob I switched from MS access to PHPRunner as advised by IT manager
author: Habit B.
pros: Create tables, link them poperly, create user table, assign permissions, design your pages as you wish, add custom page/code/design (same coding applies) build your project and test localy deploy production version to intranet or internet make desktop app from the same link fb, google account, use other popular storage providers etc. send email, receive email, very usefull - facebook like notifications enough material available on internet for noobs like me, so support is not crucial
cons: Support ! yes, I get really upset when I ask why something which worked till update i get an answer with a hourly quote for support.

review_title: Very Rapid Application Development!
description: PHPRunner has allowed us to please our researchers quickly and easily! It is making it easier for us to get our data into highly structured format earlier in the process.
author: Leon R.
pros: Our team works in the research environment so we need to be able to move fast. The biggest issue in R&D is people saving all of their data in Microsoft Excel. In the past, creating a database and an associated interface took too long and so people were never interested in using a database. Now with PHPRunner we can have an interface in front of the research team after one meeting and less than an hour. Then we can rapidly work through changes as they need. So we have moved from weeks to hours. Almost always, the PHPRunner has more options out of the box than the user is expecting and hoping for. Search, Advanced Search, printing, saving to PDF, Export usually excite the users. Being able to connect to our company Active Directory makes it nice for the users because they don't need to have yet another username and password. All of our PHPRunner users are programmers so it is a very easy jump for them.
cons: Wish it had some more options for look and feel. All the apps that we create look fairly similar. We have not taken the time to write custom CSS. On import, it would be nice if PHPRunner built the code to do the look-ups into a related table so we don't have to do the prelook-up to find the ID number and do that conversion ourselves.

review_title: Phprunner is revolutionary
description: 6 years developing systems for governments
author: Mc M.
pros: For 6 years now, we have developed over 20 complex systems using runner. Great product with specifically a database management interface. We love it for it's fast deployment approach.
cons: The forum is not always helpful. There is need for new templates the existing ones are really outdated.

review_title: It is right tool to realize your imagination
description: I am very much satisfied the development course of software in the course of years
author: Mustafa U.
pros: It is easy to deploy a new app within few hours.
cons: You should know basic php, js, sqlAPI tool is not working well or not enough detailed manual about it, also the developer is not helpful about it

review_title: The Best PHP Software in the Business!
description: Ever since I started using PHP Runner, I have nothing but praise - From the software, their web hosting services and overall service, PHP Runner is number one in my book.
author: Al R.
pros: I love the fact that you can take an existing Database and with some programming migrate it right into PHP runner given you a professional and customizable web site for your database. I was able to take membership databases and incorporate them so that no matter where the customer was, they could add/edit and lookup data making it great for the gym membership databases that I was servicing.
cons: The ability to support certain USB devices like signature pads - they all can not incorporate into the software.

review_title: Must have product
description: Fantastic software. They company is been delivering solid product and the support is awesome!
author: Andrew G.
pros: You can create system fast. Create a database point to it and all edits adds and searches are created. Code works with out a bugs.
cons: Nothing bad and and i am serious about it. I hope companies give it a try!

review_title: Excellent Product
description: I have used it to develop a lot of applications namely: Web based monitoring and evaluation system for Forestry Commission, Ghana. About two hundred staff update the records in the application. Web based Financial Tracking System for the Ghana Health Service
author: Augustine A.
pros: The ease and fastness of using the software for application development. It is also flexible. Depending on ones knowledge in php and javascript programming you can add additional features to ones application
cons: I use phprunner 8.0 the enterprise version. I am not too enthused about the quality of the reports interphase.

review_title: Initial project build with PhpRunner
description: I am working on a rewrite of an Access case management system that I built 12 years and have supported ever since. I am amazed by how relatively easy it has been to build and get the features I needed. Support here on the PHPRUnner User Group on Facebook is very fast and helpful. Since I am in the 12 months after licensing, I get free support via email from the company (not code) and it has been very responsive. The most difficult part for me has been in figuring out the code I need to write to do special things. Again great support from other users. I have been making a list of places to get help or training available for PhpRunner. Cory's videos are wonderful, the vendor has Live Demos where you can run them to see what is possible and download the project and data and run locally and see how it was built. I could go on and on about resources available to help you.
author: Bob A.
pros: Almost everything. You can do a simple app with default features very quickly. When building something more complex I typically find there is an option in the software to do what I want.
cons: Somewhat difficult to figure out what code I need for events
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Excellent Product and Support
author: Sachin G.
pros: I used this software when i was trying to build a solution for one of my clients and there was no time to start from scratch. I explored hundreds of solutions; none worked to my requirements. Luckily i came across this product, and was amazed how easily it created the website/webforms and linked UI with backend. The amount of customization it supports is amazing, almost all DB's u can think of, great features on the fly like exports to word, excel and pdf, inline edits were really helpful. Wish you guys all the best going forward... Keep up the excellent job! I dont think there is any product in the market which even comes close to your capabilities!
cons: I cant think of any at the top of my head. Installation was very smooth, however a code and db backup strategy would really be helpful!

review_title: Rapid deployment
description: It has been so easy to setup a user database to add jobs and send out invoices
author: Paul G.
pros: The software makes the ability to rapidly deploy a GUI for database administration within a few minutes. It is quick and easy to use and when a custom solution is required the ability to put source is way and fantastic
cons: There is nothing I don’t like. Each new release is like the perfect IT geeks birthday present

review_title: Best tool to build a quick site or a prototype.
description: The experience with PHPRunner has been great so far, I was able to adapt to the software easily and was able to developed applications in very less time.
author: Mehak A.
pros: Very easy to use and setup, it is able to connect easily to any existing database and can be used for data migrations using easy scripts. It can be used easily to develop a quick web application prototype.
cons: There are not many drawbacks that can be mentioned for PHPRunner, one that can be mentioned is that it is difficult to customize forms on the web page, so we end up using the pre-defined templates.

review_title: I cannot say enough great things about this software!
description: We are using this to supplement our older powerbuilder app that uses an MS SQL database. I used to create new screens and functions etc in Powerbuilder when users wanted new functionality. Now I use PHPRunner. It is giving us new 'apps' for the field and for our corporate users.
author: Melanie E.
pros: It is so easy to use. I am NOT a web programmer - well I wasn't - now I am!
cons: I have no cons really. They have a great user forum and if I cannot figure out how to do something I can find the help there.

review_title: One stop for your database needs!
description: PHP Runner is a web application that gives one the power to design webpages and customize them as per one's needs. The best part is that one does not need to have a command of a programming language to use the customization functionality. The software provides a robust security system by using different techniques like sending in reminders to change passwords. With PHP Runner, you can possibly use every database there is and convey information clearly in the form of charts and reports that too in multi languages. Not just this, once you're done you can preview your application.
author: Arpita P.
pros: The customization and pre designed templates is possibly the best feature to easily edit your database.
cons: I still have to use the software extensively to have any dislikes.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
